case_title: KENNITA CHAMBERS VS. HILLARD ARCHITECTS INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,185.00 FILED BY CHAMBERS, KENNITA AS TO DEFENDANT HILLARD ARCHITECTS INC. ALTON MANAGEMENT CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAMBERS, KENNITA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-21-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALTON MANAGEMENT CO.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-22-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HILLARD ARCHITECTS INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HILLARD ARCHITECTS INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2008 BY JUDGE OLLIE MARIE VICTOIRE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF' S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAMBERS, KENNITA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HILLARD ARCHITECTS INC. ALTON MANAGEMENT CO. JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANTS HILLIARD ARCHITECTS INC. AND ALTON MANAGEMENT CO.; AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF CHAMBERS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF CHAMBERS, KENNITA
SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF. SUBMITTED TO COURT AND ENDORSED COPIES SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
(SC-108): "ANSWER" ON REQUEST FOR CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT RECEIVED AND FILED.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS "DENIED". PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO POINT OUT ANY ERROR IN THE JUDGMENT, PER JUDGE OLLIE MARIE VICTOIRE.
